name: D'Andre Swift
headline: Swift's efficiency turnaround keeps him a sturdy RB2
body:
Swift answered a rough 2024 with the best efficiency season of his career, pushing his yards per carry to 4.87 across 223 totes for 1,087 yards and nine scores, plus 34 grabs on a 9% target share. The jump shows up in the underlying numbers: his EPA per play flipped from minus-0.122 to a positive 0.051, his explosive-run rate nearly doubled to 13.45%, and he finished as our RB13 with 194.6 fantasy points. He also commanded the goal-line work, logging 14 inside carries and 41 red-zone opportunities.

The one drag is the backfield split. Swift owns the passing downs and two-minute snaps, but Chicago leaned harder on Kyle Monangai down the stretch, and the committee threatens to settle into a 1A/1B arrangement. Still, drafting near RB22 inside Ben Johnson's projected top-10 offense buys a high-floor back with weekly upside whenever the volume tilts his way.
